security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: https://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://ipc.localhost; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.longDescription: Drag images onto the terminal — the AI agent on the remote side sees them instantly.
